creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 182436
Patch to update x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary to 4.0.3

x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary: Update to 4.0.3

- Pull distfile from Github, as it is the official upstream repo
- No need to set DISTNAME or USES=tar:xz when pulling from Github
- Add LICENSE_FILE

Changes this release:
  https://github.com/elementary/icons/releases/tag/4.0.3
